title: Zanthoxylum corumbense

Zanthoxylum corumbense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. 
This plant is native to Brazil and is part of the genus Zanthoxylum, which includes other species of shrubs and trees known for their aromatic and medicinal properties. 
The genus Zanthoxylum is further classified within the order Sapindales, which comprises over 10,000 species of plants, including fruit trees and other flowering plants. 
The classification of Zanthoxylum corumbense reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants and its position within the plant kingdom.
